# AI4PB Iteration Summary Skill

Use `#ai4pb-iteration-summary` for iteration commit summary generation before git commit.

Execution rule:
1. Run the iteration-summary workflow only.
2. Follow the iteration-summary prompt strictly.
3. Do not add out-of-scope tasks.
